disclaimers: Date is projected — the 18th Lok Sabha's term runs until June 2029, so polling will almost certainly happen in the April–May 2029 window.
India's 22 scheduled languages mean single-language sentiment analysis dramatically under-samples regional signal — multilingual models are essential.
FPTP at scale (543 constituencies) means national vote share poorly predicts seat counts — state-level alliances (NDA/INDIA bloc) are decisive.
Twitter/X is heavily urban-skewed; rural voters (the majority) are under-represented in social listening.
